events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the grounding electrode system passes rough-in review — correct location, legible nameplates/marks, no damage, matches the referenced detail — with low risk. Outstanding items before full acceptance are ground resistance testing and final connection verification per NEC 250.66–250.70, flagged as follow-up actions since the stage is rough-complete, not yet tested/inspected.
